articles.title: Bruins trade Fabian Lysell to Colorado for forward Ivan Ivan
articles.description:
Fabian Lysell only appeared in 12 games with the Bruins after getting drafted 21st overall in 2021.

The post Bruins trade Fabian Lysell to Colorado for forward Ivan Ivan appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bruins trade forward Fabian Lysell to Colorado for Ivan Ivan on June 27, 2026.
Lysell, drafted 21st overall in 2021, played only 12 games for the Bruins.
This trade may impact Bruins' roster dynamics and future player development.

articles.title: Forget the celebrities in the crowd, France are the entertainers of the 2026 World Cup
articles.description:
In a World Cup that seems fixated on trying to make soccer more entertaining for its American audience, local fans were lucky on Friday to see a game in which the most compelling figures were the French ones in front of goal.

The post Forget the celebrities in the crowd, France are the entertainers of the 2026 World Cup appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: France showcased exceptional soccer skills during the 2026 World Cup match on June 27.
Local Boston fans enjoyed a thrilling game featuring standout performances from French players.
The entertaining match enhances local interest in soccer ahead of the World Cup in the U.S.
